ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Title of the task */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* User ID of the person assigned to the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task (e.g., open, in progress, completed) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the task completion */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments related to the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was created */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the task belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task type */,
  "estimated_hours" REAL /* Estimated hours to complete the task */,
  "actual_hours" REAL /* Actual hours spent on the task */,
  "parent_task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent task (for dependencies) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES task_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_parent_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, team member) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected end date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the project manager */,
  "budget" REAL /* Allocated budget for the project */,
  "progress" REAL /* Current progress percentage of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the comment is associated with */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "commented_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was made */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_comments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the attachment is related to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the attached document */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who uploaded the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the attachment was uploaded */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the attached file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the attached file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priority_levels" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority level */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority level (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the task type (e.g., development, testing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the team member is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the team member */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the team member in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the report is associated with */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., completion rate, workload distribution) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* JSON data containing the report details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
